opportunities.title: [Hiring] Remote freelance marketer (commission) for a live PC game tool
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Remote freelance marketer (commission) for a live PC game tool

What: I need a freelance marketer to help drive sales of a live software product. Remote, flexible hours, commission-based. One person, ongoing while it works. The product: Game Demon, a real-time AI coach for Counter-Strike 2. It is live, it works, and it ships updates most weeks. It is early, so the honest situation is: the product is solid, but not enough players know it exists yet. Closing that gap is the job. The work: Organic, grassroots growth.
